overview: Cerberus is a SubBoss-class Beast/Demon monster found in Inferno. 3 grades: Common, Elite, Nightmare. Base stats (Common): 790 HP, 28 physical damage, 200 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 6. 7 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Hit Down at 250% ratio (700 base damage). Sight range 1000, combat radius 300, behavior tree: BT_Cerberus_ConditionalActionWhileCombat.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 2 melee attacks. Bite R (180%), Bite L (180%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Elemental Weaknesses: Ice, Light, Divine
strategies.description: Significant elemental weaknesses: Ice (-3000), Light (-2000), Divine (-2000). Negative reduction values mean incoming damage of that type is amplified.

strategies.title: Resists: Dark, Evil
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Dark (+500), Evil (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 200
strategies.description: Has 200 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Hit Down (250% ratio)
strategies.description: Hit Down deals 700 damage at base (250% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 1000 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 1000 units, loses target at 1500 units, 180° vision angle.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 300, ability check distance 350
strategies.description: Combat area radius 300. Ability check distance 350.

elite_differences: ActionSpeed 0 → 100 in Elite — attacks animate faster
ActionSpeed 0 → 200 in Nightmare — attacks animate faster

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 1000 units. Loses target at 1500 units.
